info.title: AquaSmart API
info.description: AquaSmart REST API — customers, vendors, telemetry, alerts, profile pump cycles

get.summary: Get all alerts for a customer

put.summary: Update all alerts for a customer

delete.summary: Delete all alerts for a customer

get.summary: Get one row by composite key

put.summary: Update DateTime (and optional future fields) for a row

get.summary: Get all flow rate rows for a customer

200.description: Flow rate rows for the customer

put.summary: Update all flow rate rows for a customer

delete.summary: Delete all flow rate rows for a customer

get.summary: Get all pressure rows for a customer

put.summary: Update all pressure rows for a customer

delete.summary: Delete all pressure rows for a customer

get.summary: List pump cycles (optionally filtered by CustomerNumber)

post.summary: Create a new pump cycle record

get.summary: Get a single pump cycle by composite key
Get all temperature rows for a customer

put.summary: Update all temperature rows for a customer

delete.summary: Delete all temperature rows for a customer

parameters.name: serialNumber
parameters.description: URL-encode if the value contains reserved characters

get.summary: Get a vendor profile by VendorNumber

DateTime.description: Set to current time on create/update if omitted in the request body.

RegistrationDate.description: Optional on create; defaults to start of current day. ISO 8601 in responses.

InstallDate.description: Optional on create; defaults to RegistrationDate.

UpdateDate.description: Set by the server on create (start of day) and on every update (current time).

updatedate.description: Set by the server on create and update. ISO 8601 in responses.

DateCreated.description: Defaults to start of current day on create if omitted.

DateRegistered.description: Defaults to start of current day on create if omitted.

UpdateDate.description: Set by the server on create and update.
